actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour component fileID 1963046888 on GameObject 'Canvas_Labels' references script GUID 064216bc04beaca4fab9a6b5d9bca977 (ToggleVisibility). Note: Canvas_Labels appears to be a UI object (RectTransform) and may not have a Renderer; this could cause a NullReferenceException. Trigger twice to cover both toggle paths.
